description.ko: 디지털 글리치와 날카로운 각도의 절제된 혼돈 속으로 부서지는 흑요석 구체의 기하학적 연구.
description.en: A geometric study of an obsidian sphere shattering into a disciplined chaos of digital glitches and sharp angles.

prompt: A brutalist digital sculpture by KURO-X, titled 'The Kinetic Defragmentation.' A massive #1A1A1A obsidian sphere suspended in a sterile #FFFFFF void, caught in the middle of a controlled geometric explosion. The core is shattering into thousands of #808080 and #C0C0C0 razor-sharp polygonal shards that follow a mathematical spiral. Heavy digital glitch artifacts, horizontal pixel-sorting layers, and sharp RGB chromatic aberration slice through the fragments. High-contrast ray-traced reflections on shifting obsidian planes intersect with digital scanlines. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing the cold elegance of systematic data corruption.
